markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review 2025 performance, align on 2026 goals, and discuss strategy for renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**2026 Goals:** Increase new users to 3.5M (from 2.9M) and Shop Directory loans to 130k (from 80k), which directly impacts revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Shift B2C content to programmatic templates to bypass legal review bottlenecks. Focus B2B on deep, editorial content to support the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2036.0)
  - [**New Initiative:** Launch `sunbit.ai` to build thought leadership for investors (valuation multiple), analysts, and tech talent.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**New Tool:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch with CheckTat, an LLM visibility tool that tracks competitive presence and sentiment across categories.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2206.0)

## Topics

### 2026 Goals & Performance

  - [**Primary 2026 Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [**New Users:** 2.9M → 3.5M](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
      - [**Organic New Search Users:** 4.2k → 4.5k](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Shop Directory Loans:** 80k → 130k](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [**Shop Directory Loans:** A core revenue driver, each loan is \~**$1,000 GMV** and \~$10 profit.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**B2B Demo Requests:** A low priority, as the B2B sales funnel is effective (60% close rate, 8-day cycle) and driven by paid media.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [**Legal Review:** The primary bottleneck. All content requires review by Sunbit legal and their bank for compliance and audit purposes.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)

### Strategic Pivot: B2C Programmatic & B2B Editorial

  - [**B2C Programmatic Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Problem:** Manual blog creation creates a legal review bottleneck, slowing publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use templates for programmatic pages. After the initial template review, only small, variable units require review, accelerating publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [**B2B Editorial Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Low search volume for B2B topics makes a programmatic approach ineffective.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
      - [**Solution:** Focus on high-quality, in-depth editorial content (e.g., case studies, media kits) to support the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

### New Initiative: `sunbit.ai`

  - [**Purpose:** Position Sunbit as a fintech AI leader.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Audiences & Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
      - [**Investors:** Improve the valuation multiple for fundraising/IPO.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [**Analysts:** Showcase deep technical expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [**Tech Talent:** Attract engineers by demonstrating advanced AI work.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Content Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [**Thought Leadership:** Beyond Sunbit's products, cover AI topics like computer vision, LLMs, and synthetic data.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [**Human-Centric AI:** Emphasize AI as an augmentation tool, not a human replacement.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### New Tool: CheckTat

  - [**Function:** GrowthX's proprietary LLM visibility tool, replacing Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2206.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** Tracks competitive presence and sentiment across categories, not just individual brand prompts, to inform strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2257.0)
  - [**Rollout:** Demo for Sunbit in early February.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2206.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
      - [Demo CheckTat for Sunbit in early February.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2206.0)
      - [Send examples/wireframes of programmatic content to illustrate the concept.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2720.0)
      - [Research B2B pain points for the editorial strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2164.0)
  - [**Sunbit:**](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2720.0)
      - [Evaluate the programmatic content concept with the legal team.](https://fathom.video/share/KzS-xJsKkyzum2W56ow_uvx11iwevZzf?tab=summary&timestamp=2720.0)
